tx_183_005_practitioner_diagnostic_use.description: Licensed practitioner uses AI for diagnostic purposes or treatment recommendations based on a patient's medical record

obligations.content: Artificial intelligence may be used only if the practitioner is acting within the scope of the practitioner's license, certification, or authorization.
The particular use of artificial intelligence must not be otherwise restricted or prohibited by state or federal law.
The practitioner must review all records created with artificial intelligence consistent with Texas Medical Board standards.
The practitioner must disclose use of the artificial intelligence technology to the practitioner's patients.

notes: This rule is practitioner-specific and is not the same as the broader Texas healthcare-service disclosure rule.
